description: Style NoteCut a dash with these sandals for the cosmopolitan male from coolers. These sandals come with new feather walk technology which gives ultra soft feeling to your feet while you walk. Wear them with stone washed denims, a casual plaid shirt and a stylish hide jacket.Product DetailsBlack sandal with synthetic upper has forefoot and midfoot strapsSoft footbed with branding printliberty feather walk technology for strain free walkingPU foam for cushioning and comfortTPU outsole with patterned grooves and an upraised heelMaterial and CareLeather, syntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
